exposureDescription: Case 2 (confirmed ANDV, died April 26 at Johannesburg ED) was aboard for the full flight duration. She deteriorated significantly en route.
status: South African health ministry conducted full contact tracing. Airlink provided complete passenger list to authorities.

passengersTraced: All passengers and crew on the flight
exposureDescription: Case 2 was aboard for approximately 45 minutes before being removed prior to takeoff. A KLM flight attendant was subsequently hospitalized at Amsterdam UMC with mild symptoms.
status: Dutch GGD (Public Health Service) contacted all passengers. KLM flight attendant under isolation and testing at Amsterdam UMC.

route: Tenerife, Canary Islands → Offutt Air Force Base, Omaha, Nebraska
exposureDescription: 1 passenger tested mildly positive during flight. 1 additional mildly symptomatic passenger. Both traveled in aircraft biocontainment units during transport.
status: All 18 at UNMC: 15 in quarantine unit, 1 to biocontainment unit with inconclusive test result (discordant results from two labs; retesting underway per WHO DON601 May 13, 2026 — CDC states no confirmed U.S. cases), 2 transferred to Emory University Hospital, Atlanta.
